name: GT-Pprops
source: Prior VALIDATED registry lemma lem-P-properties (proofs/lem-P-properties/, af: validated; status proved). For eta<=eta_0<1/4: P=theta(2Phi-1) is the spectral idempotent and satisfies P^2=P, P(1)=1, P real-linear on B(H)_sa, delta:=||P-Phi||<=C eta, ||P||<=1+C eta, delta-positivity. This is the near-fixed-algebra setup (A=Im P well-defined). Constructed and proved with NO complete positivity (only positivity+unitality of Phi and the operator-norm hypothesis ||Phi^2-Phi||<=eta); dimension-free constants.
